name: Enterprise Analytics Suite
description: Full-featured business intelligence platform with real-time dashboards and ML-powered anomaly detection. Most popular among VIP segment.

name: Data Integration Connector Pack
description: Pre-built connectors for Salesforce CRM SQL databases REST APIs and cloud storage providers.

name: Customer Insights Pro License
description: Annual license for customer analytics and segmentation tools. Includes AI-powered churn prediction.

name: Professional Services - Onboarding
description: 10-hour guided onboarding with dedicated customer success manager. Highly rated by new enterprise clients.

name: API Access Tier 2

description: Custom ML model training and deployment for proprietary customer data. Requires Enterprise Analytics Suite.

name: Starter Pack - SMB
description: Entry-level plan for small businesses. Includes up to 1000 customers basic segmentation and email alerts.

name: Email Campaign Integration

description: C-suite facing dashboard with KPI scorecards and board-ready presentation export.

name: AI Recommendation Engine
description: Plug-in recommendation engine using collaborative filtering and LLM-powered personalization.
